python -c 
import urllib.request, urllib.parse, http.cookiejar, re

out = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1016_j.neuron.2016.02.013/files/poleg-polsky_2016_nmda-dsgc-multiplicative.pdf'

# PMC shows a 'preparing to download' page with a JS redirect; parse the redirect URL
jar = http.cookiejar.CookieJar()
opener = urllib.request.build_opener(urllib.request.HTTPCookieProcessor(jar))
opener.addheaders = [
    ('User-Agent', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'),
    ('Accept', 'text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8'),
    ('Referer', 'https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC4795984/'),
]

try:
    with opener.open('https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC4795984/', timeout=30) as r:
        pass  # establish session

    with opener.open('https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC4795984/pdf/nihms766337.pdf', timeout=30) as r:
        html = r.read().decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
        # Look for redirect URL or actual PDF link in the HTML
        print('HTML snippet:', html[:1000])
        # Find any redirect or data-url
        matches = re.findall(r'(https?://[^"\'<>\s]+\.pdf[^"\'<>\s]*)', html)
        print('PDF URLs found:', matches)
        # Also look for window.location or similar
        loc_matches = re.findall(r'window\.location[^;]{0,200}', html)
        print('Location JS:', loc_matches)
        src_matches = re.findall(r'src=["\'](https?[^"\']+)["\']\s', html)
        print('src tags:', src_matches)
except Exception as e:
    print(f'Error: {e}')
